title: Anesthesia safety-net documentation

red_flags.text: Supports recovery observation, pain or nausea assessment, discharge criteria, instructions, escort, complications, handover, and follow-up only as clinician-completed documentation.
red_flags.rationale: The DoH section supports documenting actual recovery, discharge criteria, responsible discharge decision, escort, written instructions, emergency contact, and follow-up when completed; it does not generate safety-net advice.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports recovery observation, pain or nausea assessment, discharge criteria, instructions, escort, complications, handover, and follow-up only as clinician-completed documentation.

treatment_and_management.text: Supports pain scoring, unplanned admission, discharge protocol, written information, contact arrangements, escort or support, and discharge summary documentation.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The RCoA section supports clinician-provided discharge information and follow-up arrangements after day surgery without creating warning signs or discharge eligibility.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports pain scoring, unplanned admission, discharge protocol, written information, contact arrangements, escort or support, and discharge summary documentation.

source.title: Guidelines for the Provision of Anaesthesia Services for Day Surgery 2025

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.18–1.27 — recovery, discharge, information, and follow-up

source_limitations: Procedure and anesthesia, actual recovery, responsible clinician, discharge criteria, escort, medicines, wound or device care, activity, diet, driving, warning signs, contact route, emergency route, written instructions, comprehension, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
